name: Intonement for Guidance
effect: The target gains +1 to hit rolls in ranged combat.

name: Invocation of Focus
effect: The target and all friendly psykers within 18" range gain a +1 bonus to manifest and deny psychic powers.

name: Litany of Expulsion
effect: The target gains +1 to hit rolls in melee combat.

name: Refrain of Convergence
effect: The target is immune against Maledictions and Witchfires. Enemy psykers within 18" range automatically suffer a "Perils of the Warp" attack each time they try to manifest a psychic power.

name: Words of Power
effect: The target gains the "Armor piercing(5+)" and "Shred" abilities.

name: Catechism of Fire
effect: The target gains the "Deflagrate(5+)" ability for all melee OR ranged weapons.

name: Focus Recitation
effect: The target gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

name: Litany of Hate
effect: The target gains +1 to hit rolls in ranged OR melee combat.

name: Mantra of Strength
effect: The target gains +1 Strength and -1 AP for melee attacks.
